transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi Karen, Riley from SafeGuard. Calling about your policy renewal coming up.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: My premium went up $300 this year. I'm shopping around for a better rate.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I understand premiums have gone up across the industry.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: That doesn't help me. I've gotten quotes $250 cheaper elsewhere.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I can offer the loyalty discount but it won't fully match that.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Then I'll just switch. Thanks anyway.
